shadow.field:
// Roger Coqart Square Series - Verge3D Canvas版
if (typeof squareAnim === 'undefined') {
 squareAnim = {
 n: 7, // 7x7网格
 tileSize: 50, // 每个方块大小
 margin: 40,
 gridData: [],
 animTimer: 0,
 state: 0, // 0=生长, 1=等待, 2=淡入淡出
 loopStep: 0, // 0=B-B, 1=B-W, 2=W-W, 3=W-B
 duration: { grow: 120, wait: 30, fade: 90 },
 width: 512,
 height: 512,
 initDone: false
 };
}

const canvasTex = puzzles.canvasTextures['square_canvas'];
if(!canvasTex?.image) return;

const ctx = canvasTex.image.getContext("2d");
const anim = squareAnim;
anim.width = canvasTex.image.width;
anim.height = canvasTex.image.height;

// ===== 初始化网格（只运行一次）=====
if(!anim.initDone) {
 initGrid(anim);
 anim.initDone = true;
}

anim.animTimer++;

// ===== 颜色状态机 =====
let bgColor, strokeColor, opacity = 255, growthProgress = 1.0;

if (anim.loopStep === 0 || anim.loopStep === 1) {
 bgColor = [0, 0, 0]; // 黑色背景
 strokeColor = [255, 255, 255]; // 白色线条
} else {
 bgColor = [255, 255, 255]; // 白色背景
 strokeColor = [0, 0, 0]; // 黑色线条
}

// ===== 动画状态机 =====
if (anim.state === 0) { // 生长阶段
 growthProgress = Math.min(anim.animTimer / anim.duration.grow, 1.0);
 if (anim.animTimer >= anim.duration.grow + 60) {
 anim.state = 1;
 anim.animTimer = 0;
 }
} else if (anim.state === 1) { // 等待阶段
 if (anim.animTimer >= anim.duration.wait) {
 anim.state = 2;
 anim.animTimer = 0;
 }
} else if (anim.state === 2) { // 淡入淡出阶段
 let fadeProgress = Math.min(anim.animTimer / anim.duration.fade, 1.0);
 
 if (anim.loopStep === 0) opacity = (1 - fadeProgress) * 255;
 else if (anim.loopStep === 1) bgColor = lerpColor(bgColor, [255,255,255], fadeProgress);
 else if (anim.loopStep === 2) strokeColor = lerpColor(strokeColor, [255,255,255], fadeProgress);
 else if (anim.loopStep === 3) bgColor = lerpColor(bgColor, [0,0,0], fadeProgress);
 
 if (anim.animTimer >= anim.duration.fade) {
 anim.loopStep = (anim.loopStep + 1) % 4;
 initGrid(anim);
 anim.state = 0;
 anim.animTimer = 0;
 }
}

// ===== 绘制 =====
// 背景
ctx.fillStyle = `rgb(${Math.round(bgColor[0])},${Math.round(bgColor[1])},${Math.round(bgColor[2])})`;
ctx.fillRect(0, 0, anim.width, anim.height);

ctx.strokeStyle = `rgb(${Math.round(strokeColor[0])},${Math.round(strokeColor[1])},${Math.round(strokeColor[2])})`;
ctx.lineWidth = 2;
ctx.lineCap = 'round';
ctx.globalAlpha = opacity / 255;

// 绘制所有网格组
anim.gridData.forEach(group => {
 ctx.save();
 ctx.translate(group.x, group.y);
 
 group.tiles.forEach(tile => {
 let tProgress = anim.state > 0 ? 1.0 : 
 Math.max(0, Math.min(1.0, (anim.animTimer - tile.delay) / anim.duration.grow));
 
 ctx.save();
 ctx.translate(tile.posX, tile.posY);
 
 // 绘制每种线条类型
 tile.lines.forEach(lineType => {
 drawPerfectLineFromCenter(ctx, lineType, tProgress, anim.tileSize);
 });
 
 ctx.restore();
 });
 
 ctx.restore();
});

ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
canvasTex.needsUpdate = true;

// ===== 初始化函数 =====
function initGrid(anim) {
 anim.gridData = [];
 let groupSize = anim.n * anim.tileSize;
 let screenCols = Math.floor((anim.width - anim.margin) / groupSize);
 let screenRows = Math.floor((anim.height - anim.margin) / groupSize);
 let totalW = screenCols * groupSize;
 let totalH = screenRows * groupSize;
 let offsetX = (anim.width - totalW) / 2;
 let offsetY = (anim.height - totalH) / 2;
 let centerIdx = Math.floor(anim.n / 2);
 
 for (let y = 0; y < screenRows; y++) {
 for (let x = 0; x < screenCols; x++) {
 let tiles = [];
 let isDense = (x + y) % 2 === 0;
 let maxLines = isDense ? 6 : 3;
 
 for (let i = 0; i < anim.n; i++) {
 for (let j = 0; j < anim.n; j++) {
 let dist = Math.max(Math.abs(i - centerIdx), Math.abs(j - centerIdx));
 let numLines = Math.max(0, maxLines - dist);
 let lineTypes = shuffleArray([1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8]);
 tiles.push({
 lines: lineTypes.slice(0, numLines),
 delay: Math.random() * 60,
 posX: i * anim.tileSize,
 posY: j * anim.tileSize
 });
 }
 }
 anim.gridData.push({
 x: offsetX + x * groupSize,
 y: offsetY + y * groupSize,
 tiles: tiles
 });
 }
 }
 anim.animTimer = 0;
 anim.state = 0;
}

function drawPerfectLineFromCenter(ctx, type, p, s) {
 if (p <= 0) return;
 let mid = s / 2;
 let x1, y1, x2, y2;
 
 switch(type) {
 case 1: x1=0; y1=0; x2=s; y2=s; break; // 主对角线
 case 2: x1=s; y1=0; x2=0; y2=s; break; // 副对角线
 case 3: x1=mid;y1=0; x2=mid;y2=s; break; // 中垂直
 case 4: x1=0; y1=mid;x2=s; y2=mid;break; // 中水平
 case 5: x1=0; y1=0; x2=s; y2=0; break; // 上边
 case 6: x1=0; y1=s; x2=s; y2=s; break; // 下边
 case 7: x1=0; y1=0; x2=0; y2=s; break; // 左边
 case 8: x1=s; y1=0; x2=s; y2=s; break; // 右边
 }
 
 let curX1 = mid + (x1 - mid) * p;
 let curY1 = mid + (y1 - mid) * p;
 let curX2 = mid + (x2 - mid) * p;
 let curY2 = mid + (y2 - mid) * p;
 
 ctx.beginPath();
 ctx.moveTo(curX1, curY1);
 ctx.lineTo(curX2, curY2);
 ctx.stroke();
}

function shuffleArray(array) {
 let copy = [...array];
 for(let i = copy.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
 let j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
 [copy[i], copy[j]] = [copy[j], copy[i]];
 }
 return copy;
}

function lerpColor(c1, c2, amt) {
 return [
 c1[0] + (c2[0] - c1[0]) * amt,
 c1[1] + (c2[1] - c1[1]) * amt,
 c1[2] + (c2[2] - c1[2]) * amt
 ];
}
